title: GeoTiers Tier Tagger
description: Display Player's PvP Tiers In Their Nametag!
body:
This mod is a customized remake of the original TierTagger mod, redesigned specifically for Georgian Tierlist, the largest and most active Tierlist in Georgia.

The purpose of this mod is to display each player's tier at the beginning of their nametag, allowing you to instantly see the PvP level of the opponent you are engaging with.

NOTE:This mod requires Mod Menu to work! If you don't download Mod Menu, the mod will not work.
